hypothesis: If a small LLM is continually pre-trained on MOF-focused literature and large-scale chemical structure/property data, then when it is fine-tuned on QMOF and hMOF using MOFid text inputs—especially with limited labeled samples—it will achieve lower MAE than models without such pre-training or relying on 3D structural features, because domain-specific pre-training embeds transferable chemical knowledge that enables accurate text-based property prediction.
